# Iconic Glamour with Modern Soul

Step into One West Twelve Residences, where every detail is composed with a storied charm and timeless twist. One West Twelve will offer a lively lifestyle with centralized proximity to Miami’s most dynamic neighborhoods.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73ca59_489a566d607a4679b9f90fafe5d8a50c~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1028,h_1116,fp_0.50_0.57,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ONE%20W12%20-%20HERO.jpg)

A collection of fully furnished & finished studios and 1-bedroom condominium residences

[ENGLISH FACT SHEET](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/one_w12_-_fact_sheet_english?fr=sNGJiMDc0MzQ3Njc)

[SPANISH FACT SHEET](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/one_w12_-_fact_sheet_spanish?fr=sYjVmMzc0MzQ3Njc)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73ca59_9d9c544804b24d4d8147cd702eae62f1~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_55,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/PMG-Block19-02-Pool-02.jpg)

From the playful spirit that inspires your soul to the iconic modernity that captivates your senses, One West Twelve invites you to embark on a journey of vibrant living.

From the playful spirit that inspires your soul to the iconic modernity that captivates your senses, One West Twelve invites you to embark on a journey of vibrant living.

# Radiating Spirit   & Splendor from within

Take in captivating views of Miami’s iconic skyline from the majestic rooftop lounge at One West Twelve. Inside, the residences draw inspiration from a rich cultural legacy and marries opulence with  streamlined, modernist detail.

[VIEW KEY PLAN](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/ow12_typ_keyplan_lvl_10-22?fr=xIAEoAT3_NTU1)

[VIEW FLOOR PLANS](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/one_w12_-_floor_plan_binder_062024?fr=sZDViNzc0MzQ3Njc)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73ca59_665bce4ea9a144fc94241a7b9b330e10~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/MarcusRedRooster.jpg)

# Where Every Moment Sparkles

Delight in exquisite flavors and indulge in a culinary journey with a signature dining and lounge concept by eight-time James Beard Foundation award-winning chef Marcus Samuelsson, coming to One West Twelve Condominium Residences.

[LOCATION](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/location_map)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73ca59_e88ffc4010cd4c56b1c396ac84e8fc6b~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stocksy_txp69f42c98mnx300_OriginalDelivery_2273929.jpg)

# Where Every Moment Sparkles

Be whisked away by the vibrant sounds of Miami's nightlife with exclusive access to some of the city's premier musical venues and clubs, ensuring a luxurious and unforgettable nightlife experience.

[LOCATION](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/location_map)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73ca59_665bce4ea9a144fc94241a7b9b330e10~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/MarcusRedRooster.jpg)

# Where you live defines how you live

Delight in exquisite flavors and indulge in a culinary journey with a signature dining and lounge concept by eight-time James Beard Foundation award-winning chef Marcus Samuelsson, coming to One West Twelve Condominium Residences.

[LOCATION](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/location_map?fr=sZWNjYTc0MzQ3Njc)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73ca59_e88ffc4010cd4c56b1c396ac84e8fc6b~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stocksy_txp69f42c98mnx300_OriginalDelivery_2273929.jpg)

# Where Every Moment Sparkles

Be whisked away by the sounds of the night with access to some of Miami’s top musical venues and clubs.

[LOCATION](https://issuu.com/propertymarketsgroup/docs/location_map?fr=sZWNjYTc0MzQ3Njc)

Step into One West Twelve Residences, where every detail is composed with a storied charm and timeless twist. One West Twelve will offer a dynamic lifestyle with centralized proximity to Miami’s most dynamic neighborhoods. One West Twelve invites you to embark on a journey of vibrant living. Discover a limited collection of studios and one bedroom residences.

Schedule a private presentation to learn about these Miami luxury condos for sale.

# ONE W12 Residences Miami

1129 NW 1st Ct Miami FL 33136

ONE W12 Residences is a pre-construction condo development in Park West Miami. From the playful spirit that inspires your soul to the iconic modernity that captivates your senses, One West Twelve invites you to embark on a journey of vibrant living where every detail is composed with storied charm and a timeless twist. ONE W12 Residences will be developed in collaboration by PMG, Lion Development Group, and LNDMRK Development with architecture by CUBE 3.

ONE W12 Residences will feature 372 bespoke units that are fully furnished and finished ranging from studio to 1 bedroom floor plans, pricing start at the high $400’s. Units will also have the ability to rent short-term.

Residents at ONE W12 will showcase fully built-out closets, integrated kitchen with custom countertops, Miele appliance package, imported kitchen and bathroom cabinetry by ItalKraft, and built in washer and dryer.

ONE W12 Residences amenities will include an elegant lobby design, rooftop garden and pool with lounge areas, state-of-the-art fitness center, smart building technology, curated art collection, and house cruiser bikes and storage.

ONE W12 is located in [Park West](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/park-west-condos "Park West") at 1129 NW 1st Ct, Miami, FL 33136. Its location will place residents of ONE W12 within walking distance of Bayside Marketplace, the Miami Arena, and Bayfront Park. By car, ONE W12 will be 10 minutes from the Miami Design District, 15 minutes from the Miami International Airport, and 16 minutes from South Beach.

## Amenities

- Short term rental flexibility
- Elegant lobby design inspired by the glamour and playful spirit of the storied locale
- State-of-the-art fitness center
- Features the latest smart building technology
- Curated collection of art installations
- House cruiser bikes and storage

Read more

![](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/themes/mci/assets/img/layer2.png)

## Features

- Fully furnished and finished studios and 1-bedroom residences
- Captivating views of Miami’s iconic skyline and vibrant sunset vistas
- Fully built-out closets in bedrooms featuring all shelving and drawers pre-installed for absolute convenience
- Fully-integrated kitchens with custom countertops, backsplashes, and a contemporary under-mount sink
- Miele appliance package
- Imported and custom kitchen and bathroom cabinetry by Italkraft
- Modern bathroom fixtures
- Custom bathroom countertops, finished floors, and walls in wet areas
- Built-in washer and dryer
- All residences come equipped with a contemporary lighting package

Read more
